articles.title: Sixers mock draft roundup 4.0: Frontcourt options galore at No. 22 overall
articles.description: The Sixers have a constant need for support behind Joel Embiid at center and next to him at power forward. Can they fix either?
articles.author: Adam Aaronson

articles.title: Eagles rookie NFL player comparisons: OT Markel Bell
articles.description: As we do every offseason, we'll be comparing each of the Philadelphia Eagles' rookies to current or former NFL players. Today we'll find a comp for third-round offensive tackle Markel Bell.
articles.author: Jimmy Kempski

articles.title: The Eagles signed a few guys
articles.description: Over the last week, the Philadelphia Eagles signed a few players — WR Samori Toure, RB Elijah Mitchell, and iDL Zion Wilson. So let's catch up on those guys.
articles.author: Jimmy Kempski

articles.title: Flyers announce 2026 summer schedule, rookie series dates vs. Rangers
articles.description: Flyers dev camp will begin June 29, and training camp will officially be underway on Sept.17.

articles.title: Why are the Eagles obsessed with the 49ers?

articles.title: What ties do the Sixers have to the 2026 NBA Finals?
articles.description: The two players drafted by the Sixers with 2018 first-round picks have been teammates in two different places – neither being Philadelphia. Now, they are in the NBA Finals.

articles.title: Eagles OTA practice notes: Offense starts slow, but eventually makes some plays
articles.description: The Philadelphia Eagles had a full-team practice Tuesday, the second media-attended practice of the spring. Last week's practice was forced inside the bubble due to rain. This practice was outside on a gorgeous day. As always, we have notes.

articles.title: Fact or fiction: Making sense of the Phillies big sweep vs. contending Padres

articles.title: Phillies 'expect to win,' but drop first series of the Don Mattingly era to Reds
articles.description: It took weeks for the Phillies to finally drop a series under Don Mattingly, but the Reds finally broke the streak by capitalizing off a struggling Aaron Nola. Alec Bohm is still hitting well, though.
